Ibn Haldun University and Qatar Debate Center Partner to Advance Debate Education

16.06.2023

Ibn Haldun University (IHU) and Qatar Debate Center (QD) have signed a partnership agreement to promote debate education and critical thinking on June 15, in İstanbul. The collaboration aims to create an inclusive learning environment and enhance educational experiences.

Under the agreement, IHU and QD will develop curricula and educational materials that stimulate critical thinking and communication skills among learners. The partnership also includes the exchange of educational resources and the organization of conferences and tournaments to showcase debate skills and encourage idea exchange.

This collaboration between Ibn Haldun University and Qatar Debate Center marks a significant step in promoting debate education and fostering critical thinking within IHU and the broader educational community.
